/** * @author Toru Nagashima <https://github.com/mysticatea> */ "use strict"; const isCombiningCharacter = require("./is-combining-character"); const isEmojiModifier = require("./is-emoji-modifier"); const isRegionalIndicatorSymbol = require("./is-regional-indicator-symbol"); const isSurrogatePair = require("./is-surrogate-pair"); module.exports = { isCombiningCharacter, isEmojiModifier, isRegionalIndicatorSymbol, isSurrogatePair, };
